name: sleeping_room_regen
description: SleepingRoom heals nearby orcs while a worker is WORKING in it. Place a 2x2 sleeping room (type 0) centered on Worker1's spawn (-4, _, -3). Worker arrives within ~1s, becomes WORKING, room starts regen at 4 hp/s within a 4.5m radius. Champion spawns at hp=10 next to the room and heals back up.

inputs.note: place SleepingRoom (type 0) at grid -5,-4 → centered (-4, _, -3) on Worker1
